author: Will DePue
name: 12L Int5-MLP + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA (1.1468 BPB)
blurb: 12-layer transformer (dim=512, 8H/4KV GQA) with mixed int5/int6 quantization: int5 per-row for MLP weights (3 zero high bits -> better zstd-22 compression), int6 per-row for attention weights, fp16 embedding passthrough. SmearGate per-dim blending, BigramHash (4096 buckets, dim=128), U-Net skip connections, orthogonal init with output scaling, SWA/50 during warmdown. Muon optimizer (LR=0.025, momentum=0.97, WD=0.04) with stable warmdown timing (ignores compilation overhead). PyTorch 2.8 SDPA at seq1024.
